traditionalUsesEn: Digestive complaints, mild spasms and bloating; culinary spice and vegetable (Florence fennel).
traditionalUsesDe: Verdauungsbeschwerden, leichte Krämpfe und Blähungen; Gewürz und Gemüse.
preparation: Crushed fruit tea; culinary use; syrups for mild cough traditions.
cautions: Essential oil concentrated—not for undiluted self-use. Pregnancy: professional advice for medicinal doses.
historicalNotes: Classical Mediterranean food and medicine plant.
